nasb.text: The standard of the camp of the sons of Judah, according to their armies, set out first, with Nahshon the son of Amminadab, over its army,

esv.text: The standard of the camp of the people of Judah set out first by their companies, and over their company was Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

cnv.text: 猶大營的旗號，按著他們的隊伍，首先起行；統領隊伍的，是亞米拿達的兒子拿順。

ccb.text: 犹大旗下的营队率先出发，率领犹大支派的是亚米拿达的儿子拿顺，
